narrative:
Ludlow Twp township has 194 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
